recommendations.title: George Washington
recommendations.overview: During an innocent game in an abandoned amusement park, a member of the group dies. Narrated by one of the children, the film follows the kids as they struggle to balance their own ambitions and relationships against a tragic lie.

recommendations.title: Stronger
recommendations.overview: A victim of the Boston Marathon bombing in 2013 helps the police track down the killers while struggling to recover from devastating trauma.

recommendations.title: Pineapple Express
recommendations.overview: A stoner and his dealer are forced to go on the run from the police after the pothead witnesses a cop commit a murder.

recommendations.title: Our Brand Is Crisis
recommendations.overview: Based on the documentary "Our Brand Is Crisis", this feature focuses on the use of American political campaign strategies in South America.

recommendations.title: Prince Avalanche
recommendations.overview: Two highway road workers spend the summer of 1988 away from their city lives. The isolated landscape becomes a place of misadventure as the men find themselves at odds with each other and the women they left behind.

recommendations.title: Undertow
recommendations.overview: The Munns, father John and sons Chris and Tim, recede to the woods of rural Georgia. Their life together is forever changed with the arrival of Uncle Deel, though the tragedy that follows forces troubled Chris to become a man.

recommendations.title: Your Highness
recommendations.overview: A fantasy movie about an arrogant, lazy prince and his more heroic brother who must complete a quest in order to save their father's kingdom.

recommendations.title: The Exorcist: Believer
recommendations.overview: Since his wife's death, Victor has raised his daughter Angela alone. After she and her friend return from a three-day disappearance with missing memories, they begin displaying frightening behavior reminiscent of the MacNeil possession fifty years pr

recommendations.title: Halloween
recommendations.overview: Laurie Strode comes to her final confrontation with Michael Myers, the masked figure who has haunted her since she narrowly escaped his killing spree on Halloween night four decades ago.

recommendations.title: Nutcrackers
recommendations.overview: Just as Mike is on the heels of closing the biggest deal of his career, he's pulled away from his bachelor life in the big city to a farm in rural Ohio in order to help his recently orphaned nephews find a new home.
